query:
SELECT ac.id, ac.code, COUNT(acc.courseId) as linked_courses
FROM access_codes ac
LEFT JOIN access_code_courses acc ON ac.id = acc.accessCodeId
GROUP BY ac.id
LIMIT 10
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT ac.id, ac.code, COUNT(acc.courseId) as linked_courses
FROM access_codes ac
LEFT JOIN access_code_courses acc ON ac.id = acc.accessCodeId
GROUP BY ac.id
LIMIT 10
